tasks.verified_note: 11 integration tests in engine.fsm.test.ts cover all meaningful FSM transitions: UNKNOWN_TASK_TYPE terminal failure, first-step enqueue with rendered prompt + SSE task.progress, completed event advancement, failed-event terminal + task.failed SSE, no-duplicate queue row on re-enqueue, already-completed task is noop, verifier verdict=pass with generated_asset_ids, verdict=fail VERIFIER_FAILED terminal, SSE task.completed only after DB commit, input_files threading via both paths. Coverage adequate for component scope.

39 tests across verdict-mapper.test.ts (25 effective: all pass/retry/fail token variants, unknown→fail fallback, non-object throws VerdictParseError, score clamping, reasoning truncation, parseVerdictResponse JSON/Buffer/malformed handling, numeric precision) + verifier.service.test.ts (14 integration: pass/retry/fail verdict persists report + bus event, provider non-2xx synthetic fail path, malformed VLM JSON, unknown→fail mapping, score clamp, reasoning truncate, GenerationLog all paths, bus emit after commit, idempotent replay, cancelled-slot race, attempt_no coexistence). Coverage adequate for component scope.
